title: IC RegFin Legal advises Nippon Life India AIF on $79 million investment from DWS
description: Nippon Life India AIF Management Limited has entered into agreements in relation to an investment by DWS Group GmbH & Co. KGaA of $79.33 million (~₹733 crores).With this investment, DWS will acquire a 40% equity stake in NLIAIF, thereby formalising its position as a significant minority shareholder and strategic partner.IC RegFin Legal advised Nippon Life India AIF on this transaction.The transaction was led by Tejesh Chitlangi (Managing Partner) and Vartika Koolwal (Partner), with
